description:
Browser where your favorite apps won't get buried in tabs.


🍪 Biscuit Release Note

⚡️New features
- Added a first-run onboarding flow to help new users get started with Biscuit more smoothly.
- Added a toolbar update chip so app updates are easier to notice without interrupting the workspace.
- Added support for editing an app's home URL.

💪🏻Improvements
- Migrated interface icons to lucide-react for more consistent icon rendering across the app.
- Refined the sidebar app list, compact sidebar layout, active item background, footer actions, and support interactions for a more polished feel.
- Improved Backlog space icon rendering and fallback behavior for apps without favicons.

🐞Bug
- Fixed clipped sidebar group names.
- Fixed several sidebar UI issues around icon alignment, notification indicators, special app badges, and action button spacing.
- Fixed small settings dialog and sidebar surface inconsistencies.
